title: Sabala food festival draws 50,000 visitors in Visakhapatnam
content: Focus on natural farming, traditional diets and sustainable living attracts large crowds over five days

title: Price crash: Anxiety over slow liquidation of tobacco on auction platforms
content: Although the auction season commences in September–October and concludes by March every year, over 24 million kg of tobacco have remain unsold

title: ‘Vaazha 2’ movie review: Improves upon the original, with a theme that resonates
content: The film borrows part of its template from the successful first part, especially the story of youths losing their way and messing up their future, but it adds a lot more too

title: Weapon of mass distraction: Congress slams Govt.’s delimitation proposal
content: Jairam Ramesh says the PM is ‘hoodwinking’ people by claiming that the strength of the southern States in the Lok Sabha will not go down. Siddaramaiah says five southern States together gain barely 63-66 additional seats, while just seven BJP-dominated States gain about 128-131 seats – nearly double

title: Modi pitches 33% reservation to win over women voters in West Bengal
content: Reiterates that States which have done well in population control would not lose seats during delimitation; calls gherao of judicial officers in Malda Trinamool Congress-sponsored “maha junglera”

title: Time to bring youth back to sports from drugs: CM Revanth Reddy
content: Mr. Reddy said he was determined to channel youth away from pub and drug culture and guide them towards constructive sporting careers

title: Trinamool versus Congress battle heats up in central Bengal
content: It’s a prestige fight in Berhampore for former MP Adhir Ranjan Chowdhury, while former Trinamool MP Mausam Benazir Noor is returning to her Congress roots in the Malatipur contest

title: Rajamahendravaram set to host international water sport event, to begin from May 30
content: International Dragon Boat League 2026 to attract talent from 25 countries, of which 12 countries have confirmed their participation in the three-day event; the event is part of a larger vision to make the city a global hub for water sports

title: Assembly elections updates: Gherao of judicial officers a reflection of TMC’s ‘maha jungle raj’, says PM Modi
content: Rahul Gandhi said that Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma is India’s most corrupt Chief Minister and added, “He spreads only hatred”

title: Assam polls revive memory of journalist killed 35 years ago
content: Raijor Dal president Akhil Gogoi has accused his BJP rival and former ULFA member, Kushal Duwari, of murdering journalist Kamala Saikia

title: ED to investigate into assets of self-styled godman Kharat; call record leaks will be probed: Fadnavis
content: The Maharashtra Chief Minister says no one has the right to access call detail records. His comments come after an activist revealed exchange of 17 phone calls between Deputy Chief Minister Eknath Shinde and Kharat who is accused in multiple cases of rape and property-related fraud

title: Gherao of judicial officers a reflection of Trinamool’s ‘maha jungle raj’, says Modi
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi says Trinamool is opposing SIR and the Citizenship (Amendment) Act to protect infiltrators, and that there has been a demographic change in West Bengal’s border areas

title: Ladakh’s tourism stakeholders call for ‘restricted outside investment with local participation’
content: Sonam Wangchuk receives warm welcome in Kargil district after his release following nearly six months of detention in Jodhpur jail

title: Wayanad relief fund scam sets political tone in last lap of electioneering in Kerala Assembly polls
content: The Congress has found itself on the defensive, as the CPI (M) has sought the details of the funds collected by the party and its utilisation

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Pinarayi claiming credit for Union govt. projects, says Amit Shah
content: Union Home Minister says Pinarayi has launched a ‘name change start-up’ by taking credit for Centre’s free ration and housing schemes

title: Trial run of one-way traffic around KBR Park shows promise, flags gaps
content: A two-hour trial improved traffic flow but revealed lane confusion and junction bottlenecks, prompting officials to propose design tweaks ahead of a possible extended second phase

title: Assam Assembly polls: Like Zubeen Garg, Cong works to unite people, says Rahul Gandhi
content: Rahul Gandhi alleged that Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma is the "most corrupt CM" in India and action will be taken against him after the Congress forms a government in the State

title: Explore use of snakes and crocodiles in border rivers, BSF tells units
content: Parts of the Bangladesh border are prone to floods and the topography makes it difficult to erect fences

title: Three killed as four-storey building collapses in M.P.’s Anuppur
content: Victims were tile flooring workers. Police say the building of a lodge collapsed as digging work at an adjacent plot damaged its foundation. Owners of both properties have been booked

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Good response for home voting option, says Kerala CEO’s office
content: As of Sunday evening, 96% of voters in the 85-plus category and 97.4% of PwD voters who had opted for the home voting option have exercised their franchise

title: Centre not supporting State in completing UKP, claims Minister
content: Central Minister Kumaraswamy retorts saying Karnataka should learn from Andhra Pradesh leaders who get work done smoothly through discussion

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Vanitha League leader rebukes Noorbina’s criticism of Perambra candidate
content: K.P. Mariyumma says the comments made by the former general secretary does not reflect the organisation’s stand

title: SC Judge highlights role of mediation in preserving business relationships
content: It is not a new concept in our system, it has always been a part of our tradition, says Justice Kotiswar Singh, stating that prolonged litigation imposes high costs on businesses; Asian Centre for International Arbitration and Mediation opens in Visakhapatnam

title: Assam CM threatens to sue Congress leader for foreign assets ‘exposé’
content: Congress spokesperson Pawan Khera claims that Himanta Biswa Sarma’s wife possesses the passports of three countries, including two Islamic nations, and has investments in the U.S.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Home voting sees over 96% turnout in Pathanamthitta
content: Out of the 9,341 eligible voters in the 85-plus age category in the district, as many as 9,022 cast their votes, registering a turnout of 96.58%

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Allegations of ‘deal’ being made to divert attention from LDF’s achievements: Baby
content: CPI(M) general secretary says the LDF does not have any electoral understanding with the Social Democratic Party of India

title: Oxford University library marks bicentenary of sacred Hindu text Shikshapatri with U.K. tour
content: Composed at Vadtal in Gujarat in 1826 by Sahajananda Swami — Lord Swarminarayan, the Shikshapatri — or "a letter of teachings" — is devised as a guide to ethical and spiritual living

title: Mass wedding at Padanthorai sees 850 couples begin new lives
content: Nearly one lakh people, including relatives, friends and well-wishers, gathered to witness the ceremony. A wedding feast was arranged for all

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: EVM commissioning completed in Kollam
content: The process, conducted under the supervision of returning officers at the designated strongrooms in each constituency, involved affixing ballot labels featuring the names, photos, and symbols of the candidates onto the ballot units

title: WUAs have to ensure optimum utilisation of water resources, says Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu
content: Ahead of the launch of a 100-day action plan to conserve every drop of rainwater and increase groundwater levels, the Chief Minister calls for collective effort to provide irrigation facility to every acre in the State

title: Ambedkar, Jagjivan Ram are like ‘our two eyes’, says MLC
content: Hemalatha Nayak was speaking after inaugurating the 119th birth anniversary celebrations of Babu Jagjivan Ram in Koppal

title: NDA’s policies based on Jagjivan Ram’s ideology, says Excise Minister Kollu Ravindra
content: Social equality and development of the oppressed sections remain the hallmark of the TDP regime, he says

title: ₹7,000 crore land scam in Nadergul: BRS
content: Party leader T. Harish Rao questions HYDRAA why it was not acting upon complaints of land-grabbing by poor farmers, families

content: Rahim Khan was speaking after inaugurating the 119th birth anniversary celebrations of the former Deputy Prime Minister in Bidar

title: New Delhi sees flood of migrants returning home owing to LPG crisis
content: Rush at New Delhi Railway Station as workers head to Bihar and Uttar Pradesh amid supply delays and black market prices

title: Women's NCAA championship game predictions: South Carolina or UCLA -- and what will decide the title?
content: Dawn Staley's Gamecocks seek their third title in five seasons. UCLA is chasing its first NCAA championship.

title: UConn's Ball uncertain for title game due to foot
content: UConn guard Solo Ball has a foot injury and will not practice as the Huskies prepare to face Michigan in the men's NCAA championship game.

title: Reeling Islanders fire Roy, hand reins to DeBoer
content: The Islanders fired coach Patrick Roy on Sunday and named Peter DeBoer his replacement after losing seven of their last 10 games.

title: Dodgers' Betts headed to IL with strained oblique
content: Dodgers shortstop Mookie Betts is being placed on the injured list because of a strained right oblique, manager Dave Roberts said.

title: Not 1, not 2: Adell's 3 HR robberies save Angels
content: Angels outfielder Jo Adell robbed the Mariners of three home runs, including a ninth-inning grab in which he crashed into the seats in the right-field corner, to help preserve a 1-0 win.

title: U-M advances with historic beatdown of Arizona
content: Michigan's 18-point margin of victory over Arizona is tied for the largest in an NCAA men's tournament game between 1-seeds since 1979.

title: Jokic outduels Wemby in 'amazing' OT thriller
content: Nikola Jokic outdueled Victor Wembanyama in a clash of MVP candidates as the Nuggets extended their win streak to eight games.

title: Lendeborg hobbled, vows to play for U-M in final
content: Michigan star Yaxel Lendeborg suffered a left MCL sprain and left ankle sprain in Saturday's win over Arizona, but team trainer Chris Williams told ESPN he is "very confident" the forward will play in Monday's title game.

title: Geno apologizes to South Carolina for outburst
content: UConn coach Geno Auriemma apologized to the South Carolina staff for his emotional outburst at Gamecocks coach Dawn Staley in the closing seconds of their Final Four matchup.

content: Who are the best quarterbacks in the 2026 class? We sized up the top 12, starting with Fernando Mendoza and Ty Simpson.

content: ESPN's college basketball crew breaks down what they saw in Indianapolis -- and what could decide the championship.

content: Ahead of the Inside Out Classic, we translated each emotion into an on-ice role, complete with strengths and weaknesses.

content: Geno Auriemma is a defining figure in women's basketball, which makes his behavior Friday night all the more disappointing.

content: We have stat projections for the top running back prospects, from Jeremiyah Love to late-round sleepers.

content: LA's lead for the 3-seed is down to a half-game. Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings after Friday.

content: Here's what league insiders are talking about, including when Doncic might return from his latest injury.

content: Through all of McIlroy's up and downs at the Masters, his hometown of Holywood has been right there with him.

content: The UConn freshman inked his name in Indiana basketball history. His hometown added it to street signs, too.

content: Which prospects will have the most sacks through five NFL seasons? We projected the top edge rushers in the 2026 draft class.

content: The biggest (and, in some cases, surprising) picks for the Fire and Tempo had a few things in common.

content: Can Wemby's late push unseat SGA? Tim Bontemps polls 100 NBA insiders for the latest MVP snapshot. Plus, a look at the race for top rookie.

title: With Messi goal, Inter Miami get dream moment as they finally find home
content: For months, Inter Miami advertised Nu Stadium with one simple message: "We're coming home.'" On Saturday, in a 2-2 draw with Austin FC, they made good on their promise.

title: Who are the 39 best men's U21 players in the world?
content: For the eighth straight year, ESPN brings you our list of the game's next young stars aged 21 or under. Who is good enough to make it?

title: Transfer rumors, news: Fernandes to urge Man United to sign Portugal teammate
content: Bruno Fernandes has outlined one player he believes should be among Manchester United's midfield targets this summer. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Boxing results: Wilder edges Chisora on points, Riley wins cruiserweight title eliminator
content: ESPN has live updates of the heavyweight boxing clash between Derek Chisora and Deontay Wilder from London.

title: Deontay Wilder tells Anthony Joshua 'let's do it' -- the fight makes perfect sense
content: Deontay Wilder appeared to call out Anthony Joshua on Saturday, and it's a fight which makes perfect sense.

title: Easter Sunday, Bloody Monday: Trump's unholy hellfire warning to Iran
content: US President Trump issued a stark warning to Iran, threatening severe retaliation if the Strait of Hormuz remained closed. His unvarnished social media posts, including profanity, signaled potential strikes on Iranian infrastructure like power plants and bridges. This aggressive stance has ignited debate over humanitarian impact and international law, with critics fearing civilian harm and supporters citing military necessity.

title: Google, Microsoft, Amazon and Meta face an American data centre problem; here’s why
content: Tech giants like Google and Meta face mounting opposition across the US over massive data center projects. At least 11 states are proposing laws to restrict or pause new construction, driven by concerns over power grid strain, rising energy costs, and water usage.

title: Kohli's no-look six leaves Anushka impressed; her reaction goes viral - Watch
content: Kohli was batting after RCB were put in. He got an early lifeline when Shivam Dube dropped a catch. Soon after, Kohli hit Henry for a six when the ball was pitched in his hitting range, swinging across the line to clear the boundary.

title: The missing contest: Why 2026 elections are not about PM Modi and Rahul Gandhi
content: Far from being a PM Modi vs Rahul showdown, the 2026 elections are a test of regional resilience. Despite the visibility of the two national leaders on the campaign trail, neither is the decisive factor in these contests. Instead, the real battles are being fought by state satraps defending their turf or reclaiming relevance and the results will hinge on regional leadership, local alliances and governance records.

title: Amid job cuts, Canadian billionaire Kevin O’Leary points out a good thing about AI layoffs
content: Kevin O'Leary, the Canadian billionaire, asserts that artificial intelligence is elevating human creativity, making artists and storytellers more valuable than ever. He highlights how compelling social media content, especially short-form videos, now commands significant salaries due to measurable customer acquisition. O'Leary believes AI is a powerful productivity tool, fostering new industries and opportunities across all economic sectors.

title: A threat to commit war crimes? Why Trump's new warning to Iran has shocked world
content: President Trump's inflammatory social media post threatening Iran with attacks on power plants and bridges has sparked grave concerns among international law experts. They warn such actions could constitute war crimes, violating principles against targeting civilian infrastructure and causing disproportionate harm to the populace. This rhetoric risks undermining established rules of engagement.

title: Tim David, Patidar fire 97-run barrage in death overs; RCB reach highest IPL 2026 total
content: The late surge came from Tim David, captain Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal, who built on the base set earlier in the innings. Padikkal scored 50 off 29 balls, David made 70 off 25 balls, while Patidar remained unbeaten on 48 off 19 balls.

title: ‘Challenging time’: India sends aid to earthquake & flood-hit Afghanistan
content: India has dispatched humanitarian assistance and disaster relief materials to Afghanistan following recent devastating floods and earthquakes. The aid includes essential items like kitchen sets, hygiene kits, and shelter materials. This gesture underscores India's solidarity with the Afghan people during this challenging period of overlapping natural disasters.

title: Meta CTO’s message to engineers and college graduates looking to join technology industry
content: Meta's CTO, Andrew Bosworth, urged aspiring tech professionals to prioritize hands-on building over theoretical study. He emphasized immersing oneself in practical projects, from "vibe coding" with AI tools for software to using Raspberry Pi and Arduino for hardware.  Bosworth advocates for continuous experimentation and action to develop essential skills for the evolving tech landscape.

title: 'US sent guns to Iran protesters': Trump's big revelation on why weapons never reached
content: US President Donald Trump claimed America sent weapons to Iranian protesters through Kurds but the group kept them. He also warned Iran of severe consequences if a deal is not made soon. Trump threatened to destroy power plants and infrastructure if the Strait of Hormuz is not opened. He previously set similar deadlines which were extended.

title: 12-year-old boy exposes mother, sister's plot to kill father in Uttarakhand
content: A woman and her daughter have been arrested for allegedly murdering the husband and father in Haridwar. The 12-year-old son's testimony exposed the crime, revealing the mother and daughter allegedly conspired to kill the victim due to his opposition to their separate relationships. The post-mortem confirmed strangulation.

title: Candace Owens claims win as Blake Lively case vs Justin Baldoni dismissed
content: Candace Owens reacted after a federal judge dismissed most of Blake Lively’s claims against Justin Baldoni, leaving only three issues for trial. The ruling removed serious allegations like sexual harassment and defamation. The case will now focus on retaliation claims when the trial begins on May 18, 2026, as reported by The Guardian and Entertainment Weekly.

title: Taylor Swift may change wedding plans amid pressure before Travis Kelce big day
content: Taylor Swift is reportedly facing mounting stress while planning her wedding with Travis Kelce, as tight scheduling, public leaks, and complex logistics take a toll. At one point, she even considered changing plans to maintain privacy. Despite sleepless nights and pressure, the couple remains focused on creating an intimate, meaningful ceremony while balancing Kelce’s NFL commitments and Swift’s vision.

title: Packers linked to $6M ex-Commanders veteran after strong season performance
content: The Green Bay Packers recorded a pretty average performance in the last season with 9 wins and 8 losses, sparking stress among fans. While the team’s performance declined since the 2024 season, when they had recorded 11 wins and just 6 losses, it seems the Green Bay Packers are fully focused on fixing their roster and could be eyeing a veteran.

title: IPL: Virat Kohli scripts history, breaks Rohit Sharma's record to ...
content: Playing at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium, the Royal Challengers Bengaluru opener went past Rohit Sharma to take his total against CSK to 1,174 runs. Kohli needed just two runs at the start of the match to break Rohit’s record of 1,161 runs against Kolkata Knight Riders, and reached the mark in the first over.

title: 'We got him': Trump claims victory as US aircraft wreckage smolders in desert
content: US forces executed a high-risk rescue of a downed airman deep in Iran, recovering him safely despite losing two C-130s and two Black Hawks. President Trump hailed the mission as a success, emphasizing the airman's recovery. Iran, however, claims to have shot down multiple US aircraft, portraying the operation as a defeat.

title: 'Will blow everything up and take the oil': Trump if Iran doesn't make a deal
content: US President Trump issued a stark warning to Iran, threatening to "blow everything up and take over the oil" if a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz isn't reached swiftly. Tensions escalated following US-Israeli strikes on Iran, disrupting oil markets and regional stability.

title: 'Trying to import worst elements': Mamata targets BJP ahead of polls, urges vigil on EVMs
content: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee accused the BJP of bringing in "paid supporters" and hooliganism to influence elections, while also warning her party workers about potential EVM tampering. Union Home Minister Amit Shah urged voters to cast ballots without fear, as Prime Minister Modi criticized the state's law and order.

title: LSG owner Sanjiv Goenka's reaction goes viral as team registers first win
content: After opting to bowl first at the Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Lucknow Super Giants got early wickets. Shami (2/9) struck early blows, dismissing the opening duo of Abhishek Sharma (0) and Travis Head (7) in successive overs. Prince Yadav then removed SRH captain Ishan Kishan, leaving the home side under pressure early in the innings.

title: IPL: Pant’s mature 68 powers LSG to five-wicket win over SRH
content: Mohammed Shami's exceptional opening spell choked Sunrisers Hyderabad, but a strong recovery led by Klaasen and Reddy set a competitive target. Rishabh Pant anchored Lucknow Super Giants' chase, guiding them to a thrilling five-wicket victory with a composed unbeaten half-century in the final over.

title: 'Goodwill’ lift turned fatal: Engineering students kill drunk driver, flee with car
content: Three engineering students, driven by greed for a red Alto car, murdered an intoxicated man they offered to help. After initially assisting Suchit Bhojapure, they decided to steal his vehicle and possessions, leading to his brutal killing and disposal of his body. The students were apprehended after blood stains on their shoes betrayed their lies.

title: National Maritime Day: India's oil lifeline churns through conflict waters
content: On most days, India's economic heartbeat is invisible. It does not pulse through stock exchanges or policy corridors but across vast, restless waters where ships move quietly between continents. Yet, when conflict erupts in narrow choke points like the Strait of Hormuz, that invisible system becomes the country’s most visible vulnerability. The ongoing tensions have done exactly that, forcing India to confront a reality it has long managed but rarely foregrounded.

title: MS Dhoni not playing vs RCB: When could he return for CSK?
content: MS Dhoni will miss CSK’s IPL 2026 clash against RCB due to a calf strain, with the team struggling after two losses. While RCB enter confidently, CSK feel his absence. The franchise said he’ll miss two weeks, though coach Stephen Fleming stressed his strong off-field influence. Dhoni could return against KKR on April 14, or later fixtures if recovery takes longer.

title: Rakesh Bedi reveals Sachin Tendulkar's reaction for his 'Dhurandhar 2' performance
content: Actor Rakesh Bedi is receiving widespread acclaim for his role as politician Jameel Jamali in 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge'.  His performance, particularly a viral dialogue and a surprising confession of being an Indian spy, has resonated with audiences, even earning a call from Sachin Tendulkar.

title: ‘Drugged, raped, forced into marriage': Hyderabad woman alleges coerced conversion
content: she provided an outline of a harrowing experience involving deception, physical violence, financial exploitation, and religious coercion. The victim met the accused, Nawaz, when he approached her to rent a shop. She alleged he falsely claimed to have converted to Hinduism and changed his name to Navadurga to gain her trust.

title: Suspected ISIS-linked terror module busted, youth radicalisation plot uncovered
content: Authorities have busted a terror network allegedly linked to ISIS and foreign handlers, accused of radicalizing Indian youth online. Teams across multiple states apprehended suspects involved in spreading jihadi propaganda, including videos of extremist figures. The group reportedly aimed to establish an Islamic State in India, with links traced to Pakistan, Afghanistan, Syria, and Bangladesh.

title: Tech blackout: Why UAE has pulled out from key Rafale deal
content: France will solely finance the upgraded F5 fighter jet program after UAE negotiations collapsed due to a lack of local industry involvement and technology access. This decision comes as France faces increasing defense pressures and competing priorities, highlighting Paris's commitment to maintaining sovereign control over its Rafale program.

title: Bangladesh cricket in turmoil: 4 directors resign, BCB chief says he'll be 'last to go'
content: Seven out of 25 directors have already stepped down, including four who resigned after Saturday’s board meeting. The exits have increased uncertainty around the future of the current administration.

title: Raghav Chadha made to stand like rooster, beaten in ‘secret mansion’: Ex-AAP leader
content: A political row has erupted within the party following allegations against Raghav Chadha. Chadha has vehemently denied these accusations, labeling them a coordinated campaign. This public exchange of claims signifies an escalating internal divide within the party.

title: No handshake! Uzbek GM stuns India's Harikai with 'Namaste' - Watch
content: At the Grenke Freestyle Open, Harika Dronavali offered a handshake while resigning, but Nodirbek Yakubboev responded with a respectful “Namaste,” both smiling. Meanwhile, Keymer and Niemann lead the event. Yakubboev earlier avoided shaking hands with Vaishali, later apologising with gifts. He clarified his actions were due to “religious reasons,” while expressing respect for her and Indian players.

title: ‘Bitter defeat for US’: Iran hails downing of F-15 as America rescues 2nd pilot
content: Iran claims a "bitter defeat" for the US after downing a jet and a C-130, while rescuing a downed F-15 crew member. President Trump, however, hailed the operation as a "daring" rescue, showcasing US "Air Dominance." The clash escalates regional tensions, disrupting vital aid and raising fears of widespread hunger.

title: Abhishek's season of ducks: SRH batter joins Rohit and Samson in unwanted list
content: Abhishek has had a slow start to IPL 2026, scoring 55 runs in three innings, with 48 of those coming against Kolkata Knight Riders in the previous match.

title: Congo to accept deportees from US under new deal with Trump admin
content: Democratic Republic of Congo will accept third-country nationals deported from the US starting April, a deal fully funded by Washington. This expands America's deportation network to Africa, with similar arrangements in Ghana and Cameroon.

title: Deadline For Iran To Open Strait of Hormuz Is Tuesday Evening: Trump
content: US President Donald Trump said his deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz or face attacks on critical infrastructure is Tuesday evening, according to an interview he gave to the Wall Street Journal published on Sunday.

title: MS Dhoni Gets Housing Board Notice Over 'Commercial Use' Of Ranchi Home
content: Former Indian cricket team captain Mahendra Singh Dhoni has been served a notice by the Jharkhand State Housing Board over alleged commercial use of his residential plot in Ranchi.

title: "Whole Region Going To Burn": Iranian Parliament Speaker's Warning To Trump
content: Iran's powerful parliament speaker warned US President Donald Trump on Sunday that his "reckless moves" would mean "our whole region is going to burn".

title: 7,000 Feet Up, Alone, Armed With Handgun: US Airman's 48 Hours In Iran
content: On April 3, an F-15E Strike Eagle, a twin-engine, two-seat interdiction fighter jet, was downed over southwestern Iran.

title: After Trump's "Crazy Bast*rds" Post, Iran Sends 'Remember This' Message
content: "History repeats itself. Operation Eagle Claw, a historic US military failure in Iran's Tabas Desert. April 24, 1980," Iran's embassy said in a post on X

content: After Congress claims on his wife, Himanta Sarma pointed out six anomalies that included mismatch in name, UAE ID, and nationality

title: Odisha Man Rapes Specially-Abled Daughter. She Gives Birth To Baby Girl
content: A man has been arrested for allegedly raping his differently-abled daughter repeatedly in Odisha's Dhenkanal district after she gave birth to a baby girl.

title: Air India Stops Flights To Israel Till May 31 Amid Iran War
content: Most of the leading airlines have suspended their operations on the Tel Aviv route with only Israeli carriers like El Al, IsraAir, Arkia and Air Haifa operating under severe restrictions.

title: Trump Says "Good Chance" Of Deal With Iran On Monday
content: US President Donald Trump said Sunday he believes there is a "good chance" of making a deal with Iran on Monday, ahead of his deadline for Tehran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz or face heavy bombing.

title: Inside The "Most Daring" Rescue Op In US History: What We Know, And Don't
content: The F-15E Strike Eagle was shot down over southwestern Iran on Friday, the first confirmed loss of a US combat aircraft inside Iran.

title: "What Happened In Malda Is Example Of Trinamool's Maha Jungleraj": PM Modi
content: Addressing his first election rally in Cooch Behar district after the announcement of polls last month, PM Modi said the entire country had seen how judicial officers were held hostage in Malda.

title: "Flying Objects" Hit, C-130 Plane Downed, 5 Killed In US Pilot Rescue Op: Iran
content: A US fighter jet crew member who was missing for two days after Iran shot down the F-15E warplane was rescued today in one of the most "daring operations" in the history of the United States.

title: War Impact On Crude Oil Raises GST Question. Why It's Easier Said Than Done
content: While the Centre has reduced excise duty on petrol and diesel, states did not reduce their VAT/Sales tax on petroleum products.

title: Woman Killed, Husband Injured After Scooty Dragged Under Truck For 1 Km
content: A 22-year-old woman was killed and her husband seriously injured after a truck hit their scooty and dragged it for nearly a kilometre in Hyderabad's Mindspace area of Madhapur late on Saturday night.

title: Viral Video Leads To Arrest of Milk Theft Gang In Delhi
content: In a swift crackdown, the Anti-Narcotics Squad of Outer District has dismantled a milk theft gang operating in the Uttam Nagar area, arresting two accused who were caught on camera stealing milk and curd supplies.

title: 'Kerala Polls Not To Change Government But To Improve Future': Amit Shah
content: Amit Shah said that NDA vote share in Kerala increased since 2014 Lok Sabha polls and its time for a government of the BJP-led front in the state.

title: Annamalai Back As NDA Campaigner In Tamil Nadu After Months Out Of Spotlight
content: Dismissing speculation over being denied a ticket, Annamalai clarified that he had not sought to contest the polls.

title: Government Medicine Scam Busted In Delhi, Rs 70 Lakh Stock Seized
content: During interrogation, it was revealed that the racket had been operating for the past one to one-and-a-half years through a network of brokers across multiple cities.

title: Tracking fifth-year options for 2023 first-rounders: Who will return in 2027?
content: the deadline for teams to pick up fifth-year options on the rookie contracts of 2023 first-round draft picks is May 1 . if the team declines the option, the player remains under contract for 2027 . we are tracking the entire 2023 class, which had only 31 picks after the Miami Dolphins were stripped of their first round selection .
